programme.title: The Floor
programme.desc: 81 Aussies, each with their own area of expert knowledge begin to duel it out to conquer the floor and win the $200,000 grand prize.

programme.title: Getaway
programme.desc: This week on Getaway, Shaynna Blaze winds up her cruise through the Med, stopping in Corsica, Rome before heading back to the French Riviera and the famous towns of Antibes and Cannes.

programme.title: Innovation Nation
programme.desc: Focused on innovation and investment in new technology. Western Australia is a unique market place dominated by innovation in the aerospace, defence industry, mining, oil and gas and now new energy source sectors such as Hydrogen.

programme.title: Pointless
programme.desc: Hosted by Alexander Armstrong and Richard Osman. Four teams of two contestants attempt to find correct answers to four rounds of general knowledge questions, with the winning team eligible to compete for the show's cash jackpot.

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: There are mystery prizes and a jaw-dropping jackpot up for grabs for any player with the skill and strategy to see off their human rivals and conquer the machine. Hosted by Ben Shepherd.

programme.title: 9News Afternoon
programme.desc: 9News Afternoon, live and local with the latest news across Australia and around the world including sport and weather.

programme.title: Tipping Point Australia
programme.desc: Tipping Point Australia will push contestants' luck to the very edge. 3 contestants will go head to head against with one lucky contestant playing for the Jackpot. Hosted by Todd Woodbridge.

programme.title: 9News
programme.desc: Join 9News for the latest in news and events that affect you in your local city, as well as news from across Australia and the world.

programme.title: A Current Affair
programme.desc: Covers the realms of politics, crime, human rights, science, technology, celebrities, and entertainment, all investigated by a dedicated team.

programme.title: The Floor
programme.desc: 73 players remain to battle for control of the floor and in a Floor first, three relentless competitors refuse to back away from the $10,000 nightly bonus prize.

programme.title: 100% Footy
programme.desc: Phil Gould, Paul Gallen, Cam Smith, Allana Ferguson and James Bracey debate the biggest issues in Rugby League alongside the game's most influential figures.

programme.title: 9News Late
programme.desc: Join the 9News Late team for all of the day's top stories from Australia and around the world.

programme.title: Outback Opal Hunters
programme.desc: Following a government shutdown, The Bushmen risk working in a deadly, crumbling mine. A desperate Cozza works alone in a condemned mine, and an impatient Renee is almost buried alive rushing to find opal.

programme.title: Footy Classified
programme.desc: Big names and agenda-setters lock horns on Footy Classified. Join Sam McClure, Matthew Lloyd, Jimmy Bartel and Damian Barrett as they bring you footy's most confrontational program.

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: There are mystery prizes and a jaw-dropping jackpot up for grabs for any player with the skill and strategy to see off their human rivals and conquer the machine. Hosted by Ben Shepherd.

programme.title: Hello SA
programme.desc: We visit The Scenic Hotel and That's Enrico in the Adelaide Hills, find school holiday fun at Bounce Inc. and the new Wallis Cinema Glenelg, check out the Wheelchair Rugby World Challenge and meet Taryn Brumfitt.

programme.title: Skippy - The Bush Kangaroo
programme.desc: An aggressive National Parks and Wildlife Service inspector arrives at the Waratah National Park determined to instil fear into everyone at Ranger Headquarters.

programme.desc: Covers the realms of politics, crime, human rights, science, technology, celebrities, and entertainment, all investigated by a dedicated team.

programme.title: Today Early News
programme.desc: Today Early News with up to date news from Australia and around the world as well as the latest in sport and weather.

programme.title: Today
programme.desc: Join Karl Stefanovic and Sarah Abo and the TODAY team as they bring you the latest in news, current affairs, sports, politics, entertainment, fashion, health and lifestyle.

programme.title: Today Extra
programme.desc: An exciting mix of topical issues, the best celebrity interviews, cooking with Australia's top chefs, live music performances, and the latest in fashion and beauty trends.

programme.desc: Join 9News for up to the minute news on local and international news including sport and weather.

programme.title: The Floor
programme.desc: 73 players remain to battle for control of the floor and in a Floor first, three relentless competitors refuse to back away from the $10,000 nightly bonus prize.

programme.title: Destination WA
programme.desc: On today's show, Phil dives into the delights at the Chocolate Factory Margaret River, Will soars across the city on the thrilling Matagarup Bridge Zip Line, and Nikki uncovers luxury at The Lakehouse Denmark.

programme.title: My Way
programme.desc: Tim Blackwell introduces four inspirational Aussies, each with a unique story. He allows people to tell their own stories first-hand, to say, \.

programme.desc: Hosted by Alexander Armstrong and Richard Osman. Four teams of two contestants attempt to find correct answers to four rounds of general knowledge questions, with the winning team eligible to compete for the show's cash jackpot.

programme.desc: There are mystery prizes and a jaw-dropping jackpot up for grabs for any player with the skill and strategy to see off their human rivals and conquer the machine. Hosted by Ben Shepherd.

programme.desc: Covers the realms of politics, crime, human rights, science, technology, celebrities, and entertainment, all investigated by a dedicated team.

programme.title: Travel Guides
programme.desc: In this special, adventurers plus MAFS mates Lucinda and Andie debut on a tour of Ireland. They explore the Emerald Isle's iconic green hills, famous Guinness, and legendary hospitality on this bucket-list trip.

programme.title: Clarkson's Farm
programme.desc: Jeremy has found a promising pub, Diddly Squat's newest arrival teaches him a thing or two about farming, and the ageing Lamborghini has competition.

programme.title: 9News Late
programme.desc: Join the 9News Late team for all of the day's top stories from Australia and around the world.

programme.title: The Grand Tour
programme.desc: The team trades in four-wheeled travel in favour of boats while exploring the Mekong River in Vietnam and Cambodia.

programme.title: Footy Classified
programme.desc: Big names and agenda-setters lock horns on Footy Classified. Join Eddie McGuire, James Hird and Cal Twomey as they bring you footy's most confrontational program.

programme.title: Love Amongst the Stars
programme.desc: Heidi, a professor of astronomy, is convinced that a rare planetary alignment is the key to getting an observatory for her students.
